title: Curious Item's
description: The Best Mod For Fun And Randomness And For Introducing New Gear And Items To Your Game
body:
YouTube Channel Link: [Damian Gaming - Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/@DamianGaming)

This Mod Will Include The Following:

- Curious Armor - Adds A New Set Of Armor To Your Game This Armour Can Be Obtained In Survival This Armour Is Stronger Than Diamond And Netherite Armor

- Curious Tools - Adds A New Set Of Tools To Your Game These Tools Can Be Obtained In Survival These Tools Are Stronger And Better Than Diamond And Netherite Tools

(New 1.21.1 Version Has Been Released And No Longer Includes The Dimension Which Will Also Be Removed In Newer Versions Going Forward)

Please Share Any Feedback You Have And Also Report Bugs By Commenting
